channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Who should (and who shouldn’t) get the Amex Gold?
item.description: The Amex Gold is one of the best cards for spending on food. Still, it isn't perfect for everyone. Here's how to decide if it's worth adding to your w...

item.title: How to get to Antarctica: The pros and cons of flying vs. cruising
item.description: The majority of people who travel to the White Continent reach it by ship. But you can fly there, too.

item.title: Earn up to 175,000 points with these limited-time IHG Rewards card offers
item.description: If you have upcoming travel to any of IHG’s brands, a IHG cobranded card can save you hundreds of dollars every year. Here are the details.

item.title: The 12 best places to see cherry blossoms abroad this spring
item.description: From Japan and South Korea to Spain and Canada, these are the best places in the world to see cherry blossoms this spring.

item.title: With a 40% transfer bonus from Chase to Virgin Atlantic, here’s why redemptions on partner airlines can make the most sense
item.description: With a 40% transfer bonus from Chase Ultimate Rewards to Virgin Atlantic Flying Club, partner redemptions can be a smart choice.

item.title: Irish Champ Potatoes
item.description: Irish champ potatoes are mashed potatoes done right. Fluffy spuds meet warm onion kissed milk and a generous melt of…

item.title: Ring and Kidde’s Newest Smoke Detector Is Here, and It’s Battery Powered (2026)
item.description: The Alexa-enabled smoke detector is Kidde’s second model in collaboration with Ring—no wires required.

item.title: This Defense Company Made AI Agents That Blow Things Up
item.description: Scout AI is using technology borrowed from the AI industry to power lethal weapons—and recently demonstrated its explosive potential.

item.title: Save on Gaming Earbuds Perfect for Playing on Switch or ROG Xbox Ally
item.description: While it may sound unorthodox, these earbuds make a great companion for your Switch 2 or other portable console.

item.title: Amazon halts Blue Jay robotics project after less than 6 months
item.description: Amazon said Blue Jay's core tech will be used for other robotics projects and the employees who worked on it were moved to other projects.

item.title: Nvidia’s Deal With Meta Signals a New Era in Computing Power
item.description: The days of tech giants buying up discrete chips are over. AI companies now need GPUs, CPUs, and everything in between.

item.title: Manatee Stuck in Florida Storm Drain Showing Signs of Recovery After SeaWorld Rescued Him
item.description: On February 9th, SeaWorld in Orlando received a call that there was an exhausted manatee stuck in a storm drain that needed immediate help. Arriving o...

item.title: Planting Billions of Trees Turned Barren Desert into a Carbon Sink That Lowers CO2
item.description: China’s multi-decade long, successful effort to plant a ring of trees around one of the world’s most hostile deserts has sprouted an unexpected benefi...

item.title: Hero Stranger Rescues Mom and 3 Kids After Car Flips into Canal Waters: ‘Nobody was around’
item.description: A Good Samaritan said he thanked the Good Lord that he was close at hand when a mother, driving with her kids, suffered a seizure and hurtled off the ...

item.title: SeatGeek and Spotify team up to offer concert ticket sales inside the music platform
item.description: SeatGeek announced on Wednesday a new integration with Spotify, bringing a seamless ticket-buying experience for Spotify users. Now, when Spotify user...

item.title: A startup called Germ becomes the first private messenger that launches directly from Bluesky’s app
item.description: Social network Bluesky now offers private messaging by integrating the startup Germ's E2E encrypted messenger natively in its app.

item.title: Ancient Blocks From the Lighthouse of Alexandria Raised from the Sea to Better Understand Their Wondrous Construction
item.description: 22 massive granite blocks that once formed the Great Lighthouse of the Alexandria have been hauled up from the bottom of city’s ancient harbor. The bl...

item.title: Good News in History, February 18
item.description: 20 years ago today, American speed skater Shani Davis became the first Black athlete to win a gold medal in Winter Olympic history for an individual e...

item.title: A Vast Trove of Exposed Social Security Numbers May Put Millions at Risk of Identity Theft
item.description: A database left accessible to anyone online contained billions of records, including sensitive personal data that criminals appear to have not yet exp...

item.title: Mastodon, a decentralized alternative to X, plans to target creators with new features
item.description: Mastodon is looking to grow its open source, decentralized social network with new features aimed at creators.

item.title: Data breach at fintech giant Figure affects close to a million customers
item.description: The Figure data breach allowed hackers to steal customer names, dates of birth, physical addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses.

item.title: Crack Chicken Tacos
item.description: Get ready to be instantly obsessed with these crack chicken tacos! They are loaded with creamy ranch chicken, crispy bacon,…

item.title: Starbucks Copycat Chocolate Pistachio Loaf
item.description: Starbucks dropped a new Chocolate Pistachio Loaf, and I was instantly obsessed. The pistachio flavor and that rich chocolate swirl…

item.title: Crockpot Chicken Marsala
item.description: This crockpot chicken marsala brings restaurant-style flavor straight to your slow cooker. Tender chicken, mushrooms, and a rich, savory sauce…

item.title: 7 Nutrition Red Flags to Know About
item.description: Feeling unusually tired or noticing subtle changes in hair, nails, mood, or appetite? These signs may indicate nutrition gaps worth discussing with yo...

item.title: Tips for Making Exercise a Daily Habit
What Happens When Blood Sugar Falls Too Low

item.description: This horseradish pot roast is pure comfort food with a flavorful twist. The beef cooks low and slow until fork-tender,…

item.title: Fudgy Chocolate Tahini Cookies (1 Bowl!)

item.title: Vegan Gluten-Free Morning Glory Muffins
item.description: Say hello to morning glory muffins, made vegan + gluten-free ! A classic treat originally created by Pam McKinstry in 1978 at her Nantucket restaurant...

item.title: Best Gluten-Free Pizza in Naples: Top Pizzerias to Try
item.description: If you are gluten-free, you might assume that Naples, the birthplace of pizza, would be difficult, restrictive, or disappointing. The reality is the o...

item.title: What is considered a “normal meal” in different cultures
item.description: People often search for a “normal meal” when they arrive somewhere new. Something familiar enough to feel grounding, but local enough to feel authenti...

item.title: 63 Essential Things to Know Before Visiting Tokyo
item.description: From trains to table manners, these are the lessons Tokyo quietly teaches travellers. They’re practical, cultural, and often invisible until you get t...

item.title: Why lunch is the main meal in some countries
item.description: For many travellers, dinner feels like the main event. It is where expectations concentrate: the moment reserved for something special, social, or mem...

item.title: What grocery stores reveal about how people eat
item.description: A grocery store is one of the most revealing places you can walk into when travelling. More than restaurants or cafés, it shows how people actually ea...

item.title: Creamy Curried Black Eyed Pea Soup
item.description: What’s that? You’d like an easy, delicious soup that practically makes itself and will make all of your wildest dreams come true!? Us too ! We can’t g...

item.title: Tahini Hot Chocolate (Super Dreamy, Protein-Rich!)
item.description: If you’re looking for a decadent, elevated hot chocolate with wholesome ingredients, this one’s for you! We’ve been serving up this frothy, tahini-inf...

item.title: Jobless claims fall to lowest level since mid-May
Jobless claims stay low in latest week
Consumer credit growth soars in December
U.S. productivity slows down in fourth quarter while unit labor costs accelerate
Beyond to buy rights to Buy Buy Baby brand and reunite it with Bed Bath & Beyond
